market_pulse: EDC Week dominates the Strip with intense artist lineups across all major venues, strong engagement on dayclub programming, and emerging tech-house trends led by competitors like Zouk and Encore Beach.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Calvin Harris at Encore Beach tomorrow
David Guetta at LIV Beach & Hakkasan
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on EDC Week momentum with last-minute Flash Sale Stories, countdown posts for tonight's Tiësto set, and behind-the-scenes content from the VIP areas. Deploy influencer shoutouts to creators already at competing venues.

content_gaps.description: Tech-house and melodic techno audio tracks trending at Zouk and Encore, minimal LIV adoption
content_gaps.suggested_action: Source and use trending tech-house remixes in LIV Beach Stories; partner with @waxmotif (performing Zouk 5/15) for audio collab post

content_gaps.description: Behind-the-scenes DJ booth content and talent prep moments rarely posted by LIV during peak hours
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film 30-sec Reels of DJ setup at LIV tonight before Tiësto; post during soundcheck or pre-party.

content_gaps.description: Prediction/voting polls on next week's artist (absent from LIV Stories, present at Zouk, OMNIA)
content_gaps.suggested_action: Add Story polls: 'Who's next at LIV Beach?' or 'Best Tiësto set moment tonight?' for engagement boost
